/usr/bin/clang -faddrsig -fbasic-block-sections=all -fno-sanitize-ignorelist -fno-sanitize-recover=all -fsanitize=shadow-call-stack -fsanitize-trap=all -fsanitize=unreachable -fstack-check -fstack-protector -fstack-protector-all -fstack-protector-strong -ftls-model=global-dynamic -funique-internal-linkage-names -fstrict-vtable-pointers -fforce-emit-vtables -fno-assume-sane-operator-new -fassume-nothrow-exception-dtor -fcf-protection=full -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/protocol.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/network.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/manager.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/client_handler.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/client_account.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/server.c.o -o main   -L/usr/local/lib
